text.title: SQL Optimization Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply SQL Optimization end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: capture-baseline
step.action: Run EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS) on staging; capture text + actual_rows + buffers.

step.name: investigate-skew
step.action: Check actual vs estimated; if >10x, ANALYZE + re-capture.

step.name: design-change
step.action: Pick index_added / query_rewrite / materialized_view / VACUUM; document choice.
step.decision-gate: Reject 'I think this is faster' without plan analysis.

step.name: apply-and-measure
step.action: Apply on staging; run EXPLAIN ANALYZE again; capture wall-clock over sample_size runs.

step.name: regression-gate
step.action: Compare; if regression or no improvement, revert.
step.decision-gate: Reject merge without measurable improvement OR documented exception.
